figures.caption: Figure 1: Prospection involves simulating possible futures and triggering recall of context-relevant past memories at each imagined step. These forward simulations enable anticipatory and contextually appropriate behavior. Retrieved memories modify the simulated plan accordingly.

Table 1: Average Recall and Win Rate(%) of PGR-TOT over baseline methods evaluated on MemoryQuest, ImplexConv, and PersonaMem datasets. Human* evaluations were done on a subset of queries. Higher is better.
